Text.Main:
We stand on the threshold of an uncertain future,
We stand before the charge of our enemies,
An Ancient Enemy, who with steel and fire,
Looks to blind us from our Path.
But I tell you now, 
We shall not let them.

Though their numbers are many 
And their will is strong,
We shall not cower;
We shall not lose our Way.
For it is the Way that has brought us here,
And it is the Way that shall lead us to victory.

With our dying breath, 
We shall strike at these foul invaders,
With our dying words, 
We shall curse the very ground beneath their feet.

For this Path is OUR Path,
and it is ours to travel,
And this Way is OUR Way,
for it is ours to tread.

The Blood flows strong within us 
and it is here, together,
That we shall make our stand 
and claim this Changed Land
As our own.
